THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOOTE, WAYNE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 161 POWELL STREET, #608, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL SEP-26-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, ACTUAL EVICTION IS STAYED UNTIL MIDNIGHT, SEPT. 26, 1996.
